title: AI Runtime CLI (Beta) ​
body:
**June 12, 2026**

The AI Runtime CLI (`air`) is now in [Beta](/aws/en/release-notes/release-types). Use the `air` command-line interface to submit and manage distributed training workloads on AI Runtime serverless GPU compute from your local machine, without opening a notebook. See [AI Runtime CLI](/aws/en/machine-learning/ai-runtime/cli/).
